contract.purpose: Define CSS custom properties for consistent visual language
Product domain model and API types
Browser SpeechRecognition adapter with search API
contract.outputs: isListening, transcript, results, error, start(), stop(), search()
contract.errors: Unsupported browser, microphone denied, API errors

contract.purpose: Card widget for a single product in catalog grid
Modal overlay for detailed product view

M-CATALOG-PAGE.NAME: CatalogPage

contract.purpose: Public catalog page with chat-style search input, voice search, and infinite scroll grid
contract.outputs: Rendered catalog UI with search, grid, and modal
contract.errors: Search errors, voice errors, API errors

M-CATALOG-PAGE.depends: M-INFINITE-SCROLL, M-VOICE-SEARCH, M-PRODUCT-CARD, M-PRODUCT-MODAL, M-PRODUCT, M-TOKENS

DF-TEXT-SEARCH.NAME: Text Search Flow
DF-TEXT-SEARCH.step-1: User types query into chat-style search bar and presses Enter or clicks submit
DF-TEXT-SEARCH.step-2: CatalogPage resets grid and calls voiceSearch.search(query)
DF-TEXT-SEARCH.step-4: CatalogPage syncs results into infinite-scroll state via reset()
DF-TEXT-SEARCH.step-5: Grid re-renders with search results; search bar stays anchored at bottom

DF-VOICE-SEARCH.NAME: Voice Search Flow
DF-VOICE-SEARCH.step-1: User clicks voice button; browser starts SpeechRecognition
DF-VOICE-SEARCH.step-2: Transcript updates are synced to search bar input
DF-VOICE-SEARCH.step-3: On recognition end, results are synced into infinite-scroll state
DF-VOICE-SEARCH.step-4: Grid re-renders with voice search results

DF-INFINITE-SCROLL.NAME: Infinite Scroll Flow
DF-INFINITE-SCROLL.step-2: Composable fetches next page from API

DF-PRODUCT-DETAIL.NAME: Product Detail Flow
DF-PRODUCT-DETAIL.step-4: User closes modal; selectedProductId resets to null

Phase-4.name: Catalog Page Chat-Style Redesign
Phase-4.step-1: Redesign catalog page with chat-style bottom-anchored search bar, proportional grid, and stable empty state
